_note: ALL 99 companies in targets.json currently use generic support@ emails. Before launching outbound, the board must enrich each contact with a real CX/Support leader name and verified email address. Tools: LinkedIn Sales Navigator, Apollo.io, or ZoomInfo. Priority companies are listed first.

priority_targets.why_priority: 12K customers, 40% of staff in Sales & Support, strongest ICP fit
priority_targets.lead_hints: Look for VP/Director of Customer Support — ~320 people in S&S function

priority_targets.why_priority: 7K+ customers, compliance automation, fast-growing support needs
priority_targets.lead_hints: Look for Head of Customer Support or VP CX

priority_targets.why_priority: 100M+ users, $500M ARR, 219 people in Sales & Support
priority_targets.lead_hints: Large support org — look for VP of Support or Head of Customer Experience

priority_targets.why_priority: Active Zendesk user, hiring Director of CS, strong migration candidate
priority_targets.lead_hints: Actively hiring Director, Customer Success — check recent LinkedIn posts

enrichment_instructions.validation: After enriching, update cold-outbound/data/targets.json with real firstName and email for each company. Then re-run: npx tsx src/index.ts --dry-run
